title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

defines.name: Switch Transformer
defines.definition: A simplified mixture-of-experts transformer that routes each input token to a single expert to enable sparse, scalable training with reduced communication and computation costs.

problem: Mixture-of-experts models are promising but are difficult to adopt widely because of routing complexity, communication overhead, and training instability.
